basic_details.job_title: MPMRCL General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

age_limit.age_details: Deputation: Max 58/60 years. Re-employment: Min 55, Max 63 years. Contract: Max 57 years.
age_limit.details: Deputation: Maximum 58/60 years Re-employment: Minimum 55 years, Maximum 63 years Contract: Maximum 57 years

qualification.education_qualification: B. E. / B. Tech. in Civil Engineering from a Govt. recognized university / institute
qualification.details: B. E. / B. Tech. in Civil Engineering from a Govt. recognized university / institute

selection_process: Shortlisting Interview (Online or Offline) Written Test (if required) Medical Examination Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MPMRCL General Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MPMRCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download MPMRCL General Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MPMRCL General Manager (Underground) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the MPMRCL General Manager (Underground) recruitment is 21 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the General Manager (Underground) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B. E. / B. Tech. in Civil Engineering from a Government recognized university or institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the General Manager (Underground) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the General Manager (Underground) post ranges from Rs. 120000 to Rs. 280000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The age limit varies based on the application mode: Max 58/60 years for Deputation, Min 55 and Max 63 years for Re-employment, and Max 57 years for Contract.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the General Manager (Underground) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the General Manager (Underground) post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the MPMRCL recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹ 200 + 18% GST for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Shortlisting, Interview (Online or Offline), Written Test (if required), Medical Examination, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official MPMRCL website.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation provided for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details on age relaxation for reserved categories.
